description: Coming straight from the Kuttara collection of rockport, Bvallee is a stylish dress shoe featuring a Dynamic Cushioning footbed to offer all-day comfort. This oxford is completely waterproof making it a great wear on wet days.Upper Leather upper for a classic look and durability Hydroshield waterproof construction with waterproof leather, seam sealing and non-wicking laces to keep the feet dry even in wet conditions Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Square toe silhouette for comfortable use Padded tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfort Soft knitted jersey inner lining offering a comfortable fit, coupled with a partly leather lining for moisture absorption and abrasion resistance Midsole Dynamic Suspension technology in the footbed that creates a thin air cushion under the foot, moving according to the pressure of the foot, ensuring maximum comfort even with the slightest movement EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and ample shock absorption Outsole PU outsole for durability and for ample shock absorption with multiple layers of cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Square lugs strategically placed across the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
